places.title: Home in Vila do Maio · ★4.96 · 2 bedrooms · 2 beds · 1 bath

description.en: This cosy house is a perfect place to stay and relax away from home with whole family/friends. At this peaceful place you can find the beautiful sandy beach of Ponta Preta which is 5min walking distance. The house is located in a very quiet area, which makes perfect to rest/relax. Please feel home away from home. The space The main bedroom and second bedroom sleep up to 4 guests. For the additional guests, we prepare a comfortable floor mattress (single) with clean linens and pillows which is set up on request. We take a maximum of 1 additional guest for an extra fees.

places.title: Home in Morro · ★4.96 · 2 bedrooms · 4 beds · 1 bath

description.en: Fully equipped modern house with garden, swimming pool, Wi-Fi, bicycles on the edge of the Riviera with views of Mount Batalha and the ocean (900 m away). Quiet place and starting point for hikes. Shared taxis within 200 m. Morro is a "farming" village with cows, donkeys, goats and pigs. Three restaurants nearby, village convenience store. The house is cleaned regularly, towels available. Free bike loan based on availability. Free airport or port pickup. The space Independent, comfortable accommodation with lots of activities nearby (beach, fishing, biking, hiking, swimming pool, 4*4, quads...). Solar energy... electric bikes available at low prices. Guest access each home is totally yours and not shared.
description.pt: Fully equipped modern house with garden, swimming pool, Wi-Fi, bicycles on the edge of the Riviera with views of Mount Batalha and the ocean (900 m away). description.en: Guests can enjoy a wonderful view of the beach, with access to a small private beach to watch the sunset, which is wonderful. All apartments include air-conditioning, free Wi-Fi in all areas of the apartment and parking. This apartment is perfect for families, groups of friends or couples looking for a comfortable and practical stay on Ilha do Maio. Book now and enjoy a memorable stay!
